items.title: Hedge Funds Are Loading Up on These 3 ETFs
items.description: Hedge funds are always buying and selling stocks and exchange-traded funds (ETFs), and while it might not always be a great idea to replicate their moves, it doesn’t hurt to keep a watch on what they’re eyeing.
